710.reason: [The parser unconditionally calls parseMainFuncDef() without verifying that the remaining tokens actually form a valid main function. If the input ends prematurely or doesn't contain a main function, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when trying to access tokens beyond the end of the token list.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The parser unconditionally calls parseMainFuncDef() without verifying that the remaining tokens actually form a valid main function. If the input ends prematurely or doesn't contain a main function, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when trying to access tokens beyond the end of the token list.]
